meta.tournament: YONEX All England Open Badminton Championships 2022

rallies.pat3: net shot → net shot → net shot

notes.title: An Se Young bled points on the push
notes.body: 7 points lost to push errors (2 into the net, 5 out). The single biggest fix available.

notes.title: Akane Yamaguchi bled points on the net shot
notes.body: 5 points lost to net shot errors (5 into the net, 0 out). The single biggest fix available.

notes.title: Akane Yamaguchi's smash was his biggest weapon
notes.body: 5 of his 18 outright winners came from the smash. Expect it — and train the counter.

notes.title: Akane Yamaguchi's errors were mostly unforced (80%)
notes.body: 16 of his 20 pressure-rated errors came from a comfortable position (<2.5 m/s required movement). These are free points to claw back — focus errors, not fitness.

notes.title: An Se Young's errors were mostly unforced (78%)
notes.body: 18 of his 23 pressure-rated errors came from a comfortable position (<2.5 m/s required movement). These are free points to claw back — focus errors, not fitness.

notes.title: An Se Young's drop was his biggest weapon
notes.body: 4 of his 8 outright winners came from the drop. Expect it — and train the counter.

notes.title: The “clear → clear” exchange favored Akane Yamaguchi
notes.body: This ending sequence appeared 6 times and Akane Yamaguchi took 5 of them. Recognize the setup shot and break the pattern early.

notes.title: Serving was a liability for An Se Young
notes.body: He won 33% of his 30 service points (vs 48% when receiving).
